mapper.sql: t.id,t.region,t.name,t.post_count,t.follower_count,t.recommended,t.pinned_sort,t.merged_to_id,t.status, t.created_at,t.updated_at, CASE WHEN #{userId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM topic_follow tf WHERE tf.topic_id=t.id AND tf.user_id=#{userId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END followed_by_current_user, COALESCE(s.score,0) hot_score,COALESCE(s.post_count_7d,0) post_count_7d, COALESCE(s.like_count_7d,0) like_count_7d,COALESCE(s.comment_count_7d,0) comment_count_7d, s.calculated_at
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM topic t WHERE t.region=#{region} AND t.status=1 AND t.merged_to_id IS NULL AND t.recommended=TRUE

SELECT FROM topic t LEFT JOIN topic_hot_snapshot s ON s.topic_id=t.id WHERE t.region=#{region} AND t.status=1 AND t.merged_to_id IS NULL AND t.recommended=TRUE
ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.pinned_sort>0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,t.pinned_sort DESC, COALESCE(s.score,0) DESC,t.follower_count DESC,t.id DESC
ORDER BY t.pinned_sort DESC,t.id DESC ORDER BY t.id DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM topic_follow tf JOIN topic t ON t.id=tf.topic_id WHERE tf.user_id=#{userId} AND t.region=#{region} AND t.status=1 AND t.merged_to_id IS NULL

SELECT FROM topic_follow followed JOIN topic t ON t.id=followed.topic_id LEFT JOIN topic_hot_snapshot s ON s.topic_id=t.id WHERE followed.user_id=#{userId} AND t.region=#{region} AND t.status=1 AND t.merged_to_id IS NULL ORDER BY followed.created_at DESC,followed.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT FROM topic t LEFT JOIN topic_hot_snapshot s ON s.topic_id=t.id WHERE t.id=#{id} AND t.region=#{region} AND t.status=1 AND t.merged_to_id IS NULL
SELECT id,region,name,post_count,follower_count,recommended,pinned_sort,merged_to_id,status,created_at,updated_at FROM topic WHERE region=#{region} AND name=#{name} LIMIT 1
SELECT id,region,name,post_count,follower_count,recommended,pinned_sort,merged_to_id,status,created_at,updated_at FROM topic WHERE id=#{id} AND region=#{region} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM topic_follow WHERE topic_id=#{topicId} AND user_id=#{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM topic_follow WHERE topic_id=#{topicId} AND user_id=#{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE topic SET follower_count=(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM topic_follow WHERE topic_id=#{topicId}), updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{topicId}
mapper.select: SELECT follower_count FROM topic WHERE id=#{topicId}
SELECT topic_id FROM post_topic WHERE post_id=#{postId} ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE topic SET updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id IN (SELECT topic_id FROM post_topic WHERE post_id=#{postId})
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM topic WHERE region=#{region} AND status=1 AND merged_to_id IS NULL ORDER BY id

SELECT t.id FROM topic t LEFT JOIN topic_hot_snapshot s ON s.topic_id=t.id WHERE t.region=#{region} AND t.status=1 AND t.merged_to_id IS NULL AND (s.topic_id IS NULL OR t.updated_at>s.calculated_at) ORDER BY t.id

SELECT t.id topic_id,t.region,t.recommended, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN p.created_at>=#{cutoff} THEN p.id END) post_count_7d, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pl.created_at>=#{cutoff} THEN pl.id END) like_count_7d, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pc.created_at>=#{cutoff} AND pc.status=1 AND pc.is_deleted=FALSE THEN pc.id END) comment_count_7d FROM topic t LEFT JOIN post_topic pt ON pt.topic_id=t.id LEFT JOIN post p ON p.id=pt.post_id AND p.region=t.region AND p.audit_status=1 AND p.status=1 AND p.is_deleted=FALSE LEFT JOIN post_like pl ON pl.post_id=p.id LEFT JOIN post_comment pc ON pc.post_id=p.id WHERE t.region=#{region} AND t.status=1 AND t.merged_to_id IS NULL AND t.id IN #{topicId} GROUP BY t.id,t.region,t.recommended ORDER BY t.id
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM topic_hot_snapshot WHERE topic_id IN #{topicId}
DELETE FROM topic_hot_snapshot WHERE region=#{region} AND topic_id NOT IN ( SELECT id FROM topic WHERE region=#{region} AND status=1 AND merged_to_id IS NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM topic_hot_snapshot WHERE region=#{region}
mapper.sql: t.id,t.region,t.name,t.post_count,t.follower_count,t.recommended,t.pinned_sort,t.merged_to_id,t.status, t.created_at,t.updated_at,FALSE followed_by_current_user, COALESCE(s.score,0) hot_score,COALESCE(s.post_count_7d,0) post_count_7d, COALESCE(s.like_count_7d,0) like_count_7d,COALESCE(s.comment_count_7d,0) comment_count_7d, s.calculated_at
mapper.select: SELECT id,region,name,post_count,follower_count,recommended,pinned_sort,merged_to_id,status,created_at,updated_at FROM topic WHERE id=#{id} AND region=#{region} FOR UPDATE
SELECT id,region,name,post_count,follower_count,recommended,pinned_sort,merged_to_id,status,created_at,updated_at FROM topic WHERE id=#{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM topic WHERE region=#{region} AND name=#{name} AND id<>#{excludeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE topic SET name=#{name},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND region=#{region}
UPDATE topic SET recommended=#{recommended},pinned_sort=#{pinnedSort},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND region=#{region}
UPDATE topic SET status=#{status},updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND region=#{region}
mapper.select: SELECT post_id FROM post_topic WHERE topic_id=#{topicId} ORDER BY id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_topic WHERE topic_id=#{topicId} AND post_id=#{postId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_topic WHERE topic_id=#{topicId} AND post_id=#{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE post_topic SET topic_id=#{targetId} WHERE topic_id=#{sourceId} AND post_id=#{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM topic_follow WHERE topic_id=#{topicId} ORDER BY id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM topic_follow WHERE topic_id=#{topicId} AND user_id=#{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM topic_follow WHERE topic_id=#{topicId} AND user_id=#{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE topic_follow SET topic_id=#{targetId} WHERE topic_id=#{sourceId} AND user_id=#{userId}
